title: Autonomous Scheduling & Reflection

actors.name: Scheduler
actors.description: Time-driven trigger that polls every 120s (INTERVAL=120); uses socket port-lock (127.0.0.1:45762) to prevent duplicate instances

actors.name: AutonomousMonitor
actors.description: Idle-time watcher that fires every 1800s (INTERVAL=1800, ONCE=False) when user has been absent >30 minutes

actors.name: Agent
actors.description: LLM agent that receives trigger prompts and executes scheduled or autonomous tasks

actors.name: TaskFileSystem
actors.description: sche_tasks/ directory holding JSON task definitions; sche_tasks/done/ for completion records

actors.name: L4ArchiveSystem
actors.description: compress_session.batch_process() called silently every 12h from within scheduler.check()

use_cases.name: Trigger Scheduled Task
use_cases.description: Scheduler.check() scans sche_tasks/*.json, evaluates enabled flag, schedule time (HH:MM), repeat cadence, max_delay_hours window, and cooldown period; returns a prompt string or None
steps: Read all .json files in TASKS dir
Parse schedule HH:MM and repeat field
Skip if current time < scheduled time

use_cases.name: Trigger Autonomous Mode
use_cases.description: Returns fixed instruction string after 30-minute user-absence threshold, directing Agent to read autonomous SOP and run self-directed tasks
use_cases.return_value: [AUTO]🤖 用户已经离开超过30分钟，作为自主智能体，请阅读自动化sop，执行自动任务。

use_cases.name: Archive L4 Sessions
use_cases.description: Every 12h, silently calls compress_session.batch_process(raw_dir, dry_run=False) on temp/model_responses/; independent of task scheduling

use_cases.name: Read Task TODO
use_cases.description: Agent reads temp/TODO.txt to discover pending autonomous tasks; returns file contents or 'not found' message

use_cases.name: Read Task History
use_cases.description: Agent reads first n lines of autonomous_reports/history.txt (newest-first) to review prior executions

use_cases.name: Get TODO File Path
use_cases.description: Returns absolute path of TODO.txt so agent or sub-agent can directly read/write it

use_cases.name: Complete Autonomous Task
use_cases.description: Atomic task completion: (1) moves report → autonomous_reports/R{N}_{taskname}.md, (2) prepends R{N}|date|historyline to history.txt, (3) returns instruction for agent to mark TODO done
steps: Call _next_report_number() → scan history.txt for max R{N}
Prepend formatted line to history.txt (rollback on failure)
Return success message + '👉 请在TODO.txt中将对应任务标记为 [x] R{N}'

relationships: Scheduler includes UC3 (L4 archive runs inside every check() call)
Scheduler triggers UC1 → Agent executes scheduled task (reads scheduled_task_sop)
AutonomousMonitor triggers UC2 → Agent executes autonomous task (reads autonomous_operation_sop)
Agent uses UC4 (get_todo) during autonomous workflow
Agent uses UC5 (get_history) during autonomous workflow
Agent uses UC6 (set_todo) to locate task list
Agent uses UC7 (complete_task) after finishing any autonomous task
UC1 extends UC7: scheduled tasks also write to done/ dir (different path from autonomous reports)
key_data_flows: scheduler.check() → JSON task files (sche_tasks/*.json) → returns prompt string to agent harness
autonomous.check() → fixed string → agent harness invokes agent with SOP instruction
important_notes: Scheduler uses port-lock (socket bind 127.0.0.1:45762) to enforce single-instance. autonomous.py is minimal (6 lines) — all SOP logic lives in helper.py and external SOP files. complete_task() has rollback: if history write fails, report is moved back. Both modules use INTERVAL+ONCE pattern for agent harness polling.
